generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoLiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing 3‑D point clouds on the PT."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]

instance IntelDepthCameraSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel DeepSense D435i depth camera providing depth images on the PT."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On‑board measurement of vehicle speed extracted from chassis controller."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On‑board measurement of steering angle extracted from chassis controller."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction – DataTransmitted
instance LiDARPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "ROS2 topic transmitting LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo LiDAR."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDARSensor
]

instance DepthImageTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "ROS2 topic transmitting depth images from Intel Depth Camera."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCameraSensor
]

instance SpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "ROS2 topic transmitting vehicle speed measurements."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "ROS2 topic transmitting steering angle measurements."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

// C5: Data instances
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Point cloud data received by the Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image data received by the Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data received by the Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data received by the Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering applied to LiDAR point clouds for object segmentation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter tracking model for maintaining object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) model defined by ISO 15622 performance class I."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance VisualizationPreprocessingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3‑D visualization preprocessing model for rendering point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Aggregates object tracks, vehicle state and stores them in a SQL database."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serialises and unit‑converts sensor data for inter‑entity exchange."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes clustering and tracking models to produce object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runs ACC algorithm and outputs desired speed commands."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Generates time‑series reports and visualizations."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Prepares 3‑D data for real‑time visualization."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI displaying real‑time speed, steering angle, object tracks and projected path."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Executes ACC algorithm remotely and returns desired speed to the PT."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionInsight, DesiredSpeedAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Allows operators to enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed, and trigger emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Creates time‑series reports of vehicle state and object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:provides TimeSeriesReportInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Delivers 3‑D visualizations of the environment to the operator UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time 3‑D visualization of environment and vehicle trajectory."
]

instance TimeSeriesReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time‑series report summarizing vehicle state and tracked objects."
]

instance ACCDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC decision indicating desired speed and enable status."
]

// C17: Actions
instance DesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed command for the PT."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control on the PT."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control on the PT."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency brake on the PT."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin Entity generates ACC control outputs (desired speed) via a Controlling FE, which are transmitted back to the PT over Wi‑Fi using ROS 2 messages; remote management commands (enable/disable ACC, set speed, emergency brake) are also sent through the same channel and enacted by the Actuation FE on the vehicle hardware."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system is required to maintain end‑to‑end latency of ≤ 100 ms from PT to DT (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clock synchronization accuracy of ≤ 100 ms across all components; data collection and ACC computation therefore operate at real‑time rates consistent with the vehicle’s perception cycle."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation consists of the Physical Twin Entity (sensor/actuator interface), the Digital Twin Entity (data collection, ACC computation, visualization preprocessing, reporting, data storage) and the User Entity (3‑D visualization and control‑panel UI). Functional Entities communicate via ROS 2 intra‑node messages and across entities via Wi‑Fi with a Data Translation FE handling serialization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑entity communication uses a Wi‑Fi network with ROS 2 (DDS) messaging; intra‑entity communication occurs over the ROS 2 publish/subscribe system. The Data Translation Functional Entity performs serialization, message‑type alignment and unit conversion for all streams."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Physical Twin Entity runs on the vehicle’s NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; the Digital Twin Entity is hosted on a remote server/cloud platform; the User Entity UI runs on a workstation or laptop. Each entity is packaged as independent ROS 2 nodes deployed on its respective hardware."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework) for entity‑based design, ISO 15622 for ACC functionality, ISO/IEC 30173:2023 for generic DT concepts, and 3GPP TS 22.185 for latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The DT is designed for a safety‑critical ACC function with a hard latency bound of 100 ms and clock sync of 100 ms; remote commands (e.g., emergency braking) are executed under these safety constraints, but explicit security mechanisms are not described in the document."
]
